name: RedPajama-INCITE-7B-Base
note: Fully reproducible 7B trained on 1T RedPajama-1T tokens with 10 released checkpoints, Apache-2.0.
verificationNotes: Confirmed via together.ai/blog/redpajama-7b (published June 6, 2023): Apache 2.0, 10 intermediate checkpoints released, 1.001T training tokens. HF card confirms '6.9B parameter' count and GPT-NeoX architecture. Fetched arxiv.org/html/2411.12372 directly and confirmed Table 8 verbatim: RedPajama-INCITE-7B-Base 0.431, LLaMA-7B 0.472, Falcon-7B 0.441, MPT-7B 0.444 — exact match to claimed row.
